title: Section 357
content: 1[357. Commencement of winding up by Tribunal.-- The winding up of a company by the Tribunal under this Act shall be deemed to commence at the time of the presentation of the petition for the winding up.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 31 of 2016, s. 255 and the Eleventh Schedule, for section 357 (w.e.f. 15-11-2016).
